key.name: show-per-tab
key.description: Show individual control 'per tab' in supported applications

key.name: show-volume-percent
key.summary: Show volume percentage next to slider
key.description: Display the volume percentage label at the end of each stream slider

key.name: show-app-icon
key.summary: Show application icon next to stream name (experimental)
key.description: Try to display the application icon. May not work for all apps.

key.name: show-all-audio-apps-mixer
key.summary: Show all audio apps in the mixer window
key.description: Include recording (source-output) streams alongside playback streams in the Volume Mixer window

key.name: show-all-audio-apps-panel
key.summary: Show all audio apps in the panel dropdown
key.description: Include recording (source-output) streams alongside playback streams in the quick-settings dropdown
